channel.title: What's New in China
channel.description: Field dispatches from the ground in China.

item.title: Draft caption:
item.description:
Draft caption:

Magnetic USB-C cable coiled tight enough to hold its shape like a little basket on the desk. Both ends terminate in USB-C, aluminum connector housings in red. Simple detail, but the braid density and self-standing coil show real attention to cable construction.

item.title: Baseus power bank on my desk, built in USB-C plug flips out from the side instead of rely…
item.description: Baseus power bank on my desk, built in USB-C plug flips out from the side instead of relying on a separate cable. Simple detail, but it cuts down on the "forgot my cord" problem. Small design call, but it is the kind of practical fix I see a lot of here.

item.title: Wireless mic kit in a compact yellow-and-black case, marked RX and TX, with transmitter,…
item.description: Wireless mic kit in a compact yellow-and-black case, marked RX and TX, with transmitter, receiver, and charging dock slots built into the foam. Sitting next to it is a small orange handheld recorder with a screen and dial. Compact audio gear keeps getting smaller and more purpose-built here.

item.title: Bright orange earbud case sitting open on a wooden desk, ear hooks visible on both buds.…
item.description: Bright orange earbud case sitting open on a wooden desk, ear hooks visible on both buds. Simple color choice but it stands out immediately next to all the black and white gear around it. Small detail, but this kind of packaging design gets noticed on a shelf.
